archive_data.question_text: As per the Union Budget 2020-21, TDS at the rate of ______ is levied on e-commerce transactions.

explanation.english: As per Union Budget 2020-21, Section 194-O was introduced levying TDS at 1% on e-commerce transactions.
explanation.tanglish: Union Budget 2020-21 laikku e-commerce transactions mela 1% TDS apply aagum. Idhu section 194-O la mention pannirukku.

archive_data.question_text: 'Akela' is a fictional character in the children's story book ______.

explanation.english: Akela is a fictional character, the leader of the wolf pack, in Rudyard Kipling's 'The Jungle Book'.
explanation.tanglish: Akela enbadhu Rudyard Kipling ezhuthiya 'The Jungle Book' kuuladhu oru wolf pack leader character. Idhu Siruthai Pullingal siruvara kadhaiyil varum.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years was the Family Courts Act enacted?

explanation.english: The Family Courts Act was enacted in 1984 to establish Family Courts for resolving family disputes.
explanation.tanglish: Family Courts Act 1984 varudathil enact pannappattadhu. Idu kudumbathu uravugalai theerpu seyyum nyayasthanangalai uruvakkum.

archive_data.question_text: The ______ in Punjab is held to commemorate the warriors who laid down their lives in the battle between Guru Gobind Singh and the Mughals.

explanation.english: Maghi Mela commemorates the 40 Sikh warriors who died in the Battle of Muktsar (1705) between Guru Gobind Singh and the Mughals.
explanation.tanglish: Maghi Mela enbadhu Guru Gobind Singh um Mughalkalum idaiyana Muktsar yuddhathil uhir kotutha 40 Sikh veerargalai ninaivu koorum thiruvizha. Idhu Punjab la Maghi maasathil nadakkum.

archive_data.question_text: The Rohtas Fort is located in present day ______.

explanation.english: Rohtas Fort is located in present-day Punjab province of Pakistan. It was built by Sher Shah Suri.
explanation.tanglish: Rohtas Fort enbadhu ipodhu Pakistan la ulla Punjab province la irukkirathu. Idhu Sher Shah Suri kaalam la kattappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: By which Constitutional Amendment Act, the voting age of Indian citizens has been reduced from 21 years to 18 years?

explanation.english: The 61st Constitutional Amendment Act of 1988 reduced the voting age from 21 to 18 years.
explanation.tanglish: Arasiyal saadhanaikku 61-amathu thirutham 1988 la varthu, matheduthal umayam 21 vayatilirundhu 18 vayathukku kuraichiyadhu.

archive_data.question_text: The Census of India 2011 was the ______ national census after Independence.

explanation.english: The Census of India 2011 was the 7th national census after Independence (previous ones being 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991, and 2001).
explanation.tanglish: India svathanthram ambintha muthal 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991, 2001, 2011 endru 7 janaganaithigal nadathiyulladhu. 2011 7-amathu janaganaithi.

archive_data.question_text: Who was the head coach of the Mumbai Indians IPL cricket team in 2019?

explanation.english: Mahela Jayawardene served as the head coach of Mumbai Indians IPL team in 2019.
explanation.tanglish: Mahela Jayawardene 2019 varudathil Mumbai Indians IPL cricket teamin head coach aanar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is INCORRECT?

options.text: Proteins help build and repair tissues in the human body.
Extra fat in the human body is stored under the skin.
Deficiency of iodine in the human body causes anaemia.
The human body needs minerals in small quantities.

explanation.english: Iodine deficiency causes goitre, not anaemia. Anaemia is caused by iron deficiency.
explanation.tanglish: Iodine kuraiyaal goitre vadham varum, ratham patriya kurai (anaemia) varaadhu. Ratham patriya kuraiyakkum iron kurai thaan kaaranam. So statement 3 thappu.

archive_data.question_text: A football stadium named after Bhaichung Bhutia has been built near his birthplace in ______.

explanation.english: Bhaichung Bhutia, the famous Indian footballer, was born in Sikkim, and a stadium has been named after him there.
explanation.tanglish: Bhaichung Bhutia enbadhu Sikkim maanilathil pirandha oru prasiddha Indian footballer. Avar pirandha idathirku arukil oru football stadium avar peyaril amaikkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following organisations/agencies does NOT operate a 'Payment Bank' in India as of August 2020?

explanation.english: As of August 2020, Wipro did not operate a Payment Bank, while Fino, India Post, and Jio operated Payment Banks.
explanation.tanglish: August 2020 varai Wipro oru payment bankai nadathavillai. Fino, India Post, Jio Payment Bank ivai nadathiyullana.
